assertions.title: Engagement buckets exist in jade scoring

steps.expected: Tests pass showing engagement-derived buckets (interaction_strength, commercial_intent, propagation_velocity) exist in jade pack _bucket_scores
steps.observed: 2 passed (test_high_engagement_post_scores_higher_than_low_engagement_jade, test_no_engagement_data_scores_correctly_jade). jade_pack._bucket_scores returns interaction_strength, commercial_intent, propagation_velocity buckets computed from engagement data.

steps.action: Verify jade_pack.py source imports compute_engagement_buckets and includes engagement bucket weights
steps.expected: Engagement buckets integrated in scoring function
steps.observed: jade_pack.py imports compute_engagement_buckets, calls it in _bucket_scores(), and has weights: interaction_strength=0.15, commercial_intent=0.10, propagation_velocity=0.05

assertions.title: Engagement buckets exist in streetwear scoring

steps.expected: Tests pass showing engagement-derived buckets exist alongside keyword buckets in streetwear pack _bucket_scores
steps.observed: 2 passed (test_high_engagement_post_scores_higher_than_low_engagement_streetwear, test_no_engagement_data_scores_correctly_streetwear). streetwear_pack._bucket_scores returns silhouette, graphic, layering, brand, material, commerce (keyword) + interaction_strength, commercial_intent, propagation_velocity (engagement).

steps.action: Verify streetwear_pack.py source imports compute_engagement_buckets and includes engagement bucket weights
steps.expected: Engagement buckets integrated alongside existing keyword buckets
steps.observed: streetwear_pack.py imports compute_engagement_buckets, calls it in _bucket_scores(), and has weights: interaction_strength=0.15, commercial_intent=0.10, propagation_velocity=0.05

assertions.title: High engagement post scores higher than low engagement

steps.expected: Tests pass showing that with identical keyword content but different engagement levels, high-engagement posts receive higher weighted scores
steps.observed: 2 passed (jade and streetwear variants). Tests verify keyword buckets are identical (same content), while engagement buckets (interaction_strength, commercial_intent, propagation_velocity) are strictly greater for high-engagement posts (100K likes/50K saves vs 10 likes/2 saves).

steps.expected: Tests pass showing posts with engagement=None score correctly using keyword buckets alone, without errors
steps.observed: 2 passed (jade and streetwear variants). Tests verify: all expected buckets exist including engagement buckets, engagement buckets are 0.0 (neutral), keyword buckets work normally (jade_signal=1.0, modernity>0, commerce>0).

assertions.title: Real pilot re-scoring shows engagement impact

steps.observed: Exit code 0. Produced 5 output files including scored_samples.json (1.4MB) with 293 scored posts.

steps.action: Inspect scored_samples.json: verify all 293 posts have engagement data and non-zero engagement buckets
steps.expected: Engagement data populated from raw Chinese number fields
steps.observed: 293/293 samples have engagement data (likes, saves, comments, shares parsed from Chinese formats like '10万+' → 100000). All 293 have non-zero interaction_strength.

steps.action: Compare rankings: engagement-included vs keyword-only scoring
steps.expected: Rankings differ meaningfully between the two scoring modes
steps.observed: 17/20 top-20 positions differ between engagement-included and keyword-only rankings. Engagement buckets weighted at 30% of total score cause significant re-ordering.

steps.action: Verify posts with same keyword content rank differently based on engagement
steps.expected: Within same keyword-score groups, high-engagement posts rank higher
steps.observed: Across 16 keyword-score groups examined, posts with higher engagement consistently scored higher. E.g., in kw group 2.5: post with 31K likes/25K saves scored 0.54 vs post with 622 likes/19 saves scored 0.41.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All engagement-derived scoring buckets (interaction_strength, commercial_intent, propagation_velocity) are implemented in both jade and streetwear packs. High-engagement posts score higher than low-engagement posts with identical content. Backward compatibility preserved (engagement=None scores correctly). Real 293-post pilot data shows engagement impact with 17/20 top-20 rank changes vs keyword-only scoring.
